nasb.text: I will restore the fortunes of Judah and the fortunes of Israel and will rebuild them as they were at first.

esv.text: I will restore the fortunes of Judah and the fortunes of Israel, and rebuild them as they were at first.

cnv.text: 我必使猶大被擄的和以色列被擄的都歸回，並且建立他們像起初一樣。

ccb.text: 我要使被掳的犹大人和以色列人回到故土，重建家园。
